VO_EN: The words don't mean what you do anymore.
VO_VI: Nhung tu do khong con nghia la dieu ban lam nua.

VO_EN: They mean what you are.
VO_VI: Chung co nghia la con nguoi ban.

VO_EN: They always did.
VO_VI: Luc nao cung vay.

VO_EN: You can't tell which ones were real.
VO_VI: Ban khong phan biet duoc dau la that.

VO_EN: You're not sure there were any.
VO_VI: Ban khong chac la co vu nao that.
